children.name: p
children.textContent: "Wealth is what you don't spend. Its value lies in giving you options."

children.name: p
children.textContent: Morgan Housel · The Psychology of Money

children.name: p
children.textContent: "All babies need the 5 S's: Swaddle, Side/Stomach, Shush, Swing, Suck."

children.name: p
children.textContent: Harvey Karp · The Happiest Baby on the Block

children.name: p
children.textContent: "Nothing in life is as important as you think it is while you're thinking about it."

children.name: p
children.textContent: Daniel Kahneman · Thinking Fast and Slow

children.textContent: "Wealth is what you don't spend. Its value lies in giving you options."

children.name: p
children.textContent: Morgan Housel · The Psychology of Money

children.name: p
children.textContent: "All babies need the 5 S's: Swaddle, Side/Stomach, Shush, Swing, Suck."

children.name: p
children.textContent: Harvey Karp · The Happiest Baby on the Block

children.name: p
children.textContent: "Nothing in life is as important as you think it is while you're thinking about it."

children.name: p
children.textContent: Daniel Kahneman · Thinking Fast and Slow

children.name: p
children.textContent: Find advice by problem, emotion or goal

children.name: svg
children.svgString: <svg xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" width="18" height="18" viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke="#4A5168" stroke-width="2" stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round" class="lucide lucide-search" aria-hidden="true"><path d="m21 21-4.34-4.34"/><circle cx="11" cy="11" r="8"/></svg>

children.name: svg
children.svgString: <svg xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" width="13" height="13" viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke="#4A5168" stroke-width="2" stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round" class="lucide lucide-layers" aria-hidden="true"><path d="M12.83 2.18a2 2 0 0 0-1.66 0L2.6 6.08a1 1 0 0 0 0 1.83l8.58 3.91a2 2 0 0 0 1.66 0l8.58-3.9a1 1 0 0 0 0-1.83z"/><path d="M2 12a1 1 0 0 0 .58.91l8.6 3.91a2 2 0 0 0 1.65 0l8.58-3.9A1 1 0 0 0 22 12"/><path d="M2 17a1 1 0 0 0 .58.91l8.6 3.91a2 2 0 0 0 1.65 0l8.58-3.9A1 1 0 0 0 22 17"/></svg>

children.name: svg
children.svgString: <svg xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" width="10" height="10" viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke="#4A5168" stroke-width="2" stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round" class="lucide lucide-link2 lucide-link-2" aria-hidden="true"><path d="M9 17H7A5 5 0 0 1 7 7h2"/><path d="M15 7h2a5 5 0 1 1 0 10h-2"/><line x1="8" x2="16" y1="12" y2="12"/></svg>

children.name: p
children.textContent: "You don't have to see the whole staircase, just take the first step."

children.name: svg
children.svgString: <svg xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" width="10" height="10" viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke="#4A5168" stroke-width="2" stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round" class="lucide lucide-link2 lucide-link-2" aria-hidden="true"><path d="M9 17H7A5 5 0 0 1 7 7h2"/><path d="M15 7h2a5 5 0 1 1 0 10h-2"/><line x1="8" x2="16" y1="12" y2="12"/></svg>

children.name: p
children.textContent: "Clarity about what matters provides clarity about what does not."

children.name: svg
children.svgString: <svg xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" width="10" height="10" viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke="#4A5168" stroke-width="2" stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round" class="lucide lucide-link2 lucide-link-2" aria-hidden="true"><path d="M9 17H7A5 5 0 0 1 7 7h2"/><path d="M15 7h2a5 5 0 1 1 0 10h-2"/><line x1="8" x2="16" y1="12" y2="12"/></svg>

children.name: p
children.textContent: "Vulnerability is not weakness. It's the birthplace of innovation and creativity."

children.name: svg
children.svgString: <svg xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" width="10" height="10" viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke="#4A5168" stroke-width="2" stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round" class="lucide lucide-link2 lucide-link-2" aria-hidden="true"><path d="M9 17H7A5 5 0 0 1 7 7h2"/><path d="M15 7h2a5 5 0 1 1 0 10h-2"/><line x1="8" x2="16" y1="12" y2="12"/></svg>

children.name: p
children.textContent: "The most important thing in communication is hearing what isn't said."

children.name: svg
children.svgString: <svg xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" width="22" height="22" viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke="#4A5168" stroke-width="1.8" stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round" class="lucide lucide-house" aria-hidden="true"><path d="M15 21v-8a1 1 0 0 0-1-1h-4a1 1 0 0 0-1 1v8"/><path d="M3 10a2 2 0 0 1 .709-1.528l7-6a2 2 0 0 1 2.582 0l7 6A2 2 0 0 1 21 10v9a2 2 0 0 1-2 2H5a2 2 0 0 1-2-2z"/></svg>

children.name: p
children.textContent: "In a growth mindset, challenges are exciting."

children.name: p
children.textContent: Man's Search for Meaning · Viktor Frankl

children.name: p
children.textContent: "Between stimulus and response there is a space."

children.name: p
children.textContent: "Small habits make a big difference over time."

children.name: p
children.textContent: "Successful people quit the wrong stuff fast."
